name: 3k-codestyle
description: Linter and formatter enforcing 3Kingdoms MUD LPC codestyle conventions

3k-codestyle.enable.description: Enable/disable the 3K codestyle linter and formatter.

3k-codestyle.lint.pragmaStrongTypes.description: Require #pragma strong_types as the first line of .c files.

3k-codestyle.lint.includeDefsH.description: Require #include "defs.h" (or variant) in every .c file. Skips .h headers.

3k-codestyle.lint.lineLength.description: Warn on lines exceeding the maximum length.

3k-codestyle.lint.allmanBrackets.description: Require Allman-style braces (opening brace on its own line).

3k-codestyle.lint.voidReturn.description: Require explicit return; at end of void functions.

3k-codestyle.lint.statusType.description: Suggest using status type instead of int for boolean functions.

3k-codestyle.lint.singleStatementBracket.description: Flag unnecessary brackets on single-statement if/else.

3k-codestyle.lint.superCreate.description: Warn if create() or init() do not call their parent (::) version in .c files.

3k-codestyle.lint.unwrappedString.description: Warn when output functions (write, tell_object, ansi_write, etc.) have long strings not wrapped in word_wrap(). Context-aware: skips create()/reset(), distinguishes single-target vs multi-target functions.

3k-codestyle.lint.fileStructureOrder.description: Hint when file sections are out of order: pragma, includes, defines, inherit, globals/prototypes, one-liners, create(), init(), reset(), other functions.

3k-codestyle.lint.forwardReference.description: Warn when a function is called before it is defined and has no forward prototype declaration.

3k-codestyle.lint.defineUppercase.description: Warn when #define macro names are not UPPERCASE.

3k-codestyle.lint.staticDeprecated.description: Hint that 'static' is deprecated; use 'protected' for functions and 'nosave' for variables.

3k-codestyle.lint.fileHeaderComment.description: Hint when .c files don't start with a comment block (filename, author, date).

3k-codestyle.lint.filenameConventions.description: Warn when filenames contain spaces or uppercase letters.

3k-codestyle.lint.mixedType.description: Hint when 'mixed' type is used; prefer specific types.

3k-codestyle.lint.sprintfPreference.description: Hint to use sprintf() instead of string concatenation (+) in output functions.

3k-codestyle.lint.defineParenthesized.description: Hint when #define values with concatenation (+) are not wrapped in parentheses.

3k-codestyle.lint.privateVariables.description: Hint when global variables in inheritable files are not declared private.

3k-codestyle.lint.floatCriticalData.description: Hint when float is used for critical game data (experience, gold, etc.).

3k-codestyle.lint.bracesAroundMacro.description: Warn when UPPERCASE macro calls are used as braceless if/else bodies — prevents dangling else bugs from macro expansion.

3k-codestyle.lint.closureQuoteFix.description: Hint when #'function closure references lack a /*'*/ comment to close the unmatched quote for IDE syntax highlighting.
